## Source: ghsa-malware (cdc07392222f8dab0bd84a793691c6f3b395cacc03acc41dbfccbf09d63fa5d0)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (12a3ed7380fdb815c2f8c5a086b33d516acc0bbdaab4d4df8203efed20ae348b)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'naveengem' @ 0.1.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:
- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'naveengem' @ 0.1.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:
- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
